Package org.key_project.prover.rules.instantiation

@NullMarked package org.key_project.prover.rules.instantiation
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.key_project.prover.rules
     
    org.key_project.prover.rules.instantiation.caches
     
    org.key_project.prover.rules.conditions

  • Class
    Description
    AssumesFormulaInstantiation
    represents an instantiation of a formula that is part of the taclet's assumes sequent
    AssumesFormulaInstDirect
    Instantiation of an assumes-formula that has to be proven by an explicit assumes-goal
    AssumesFormulaInstSeq
    Instantiation of an assumes-formula that is present as a formula of the proof goal's sequent.
    AssumesMatchResult
    There can be several candidates for matching a formula of an assumes clause of a taclet.
    IllegalInstantiationException
    this exception is thrown if an invalid instantiation for a schema variable was given
    InstantiationEntry<E>
    This is an abstract class that encapsulates an instantiation of a SchemaVariable.
    ListInstantiation<T>
    This class is used to store the instantiation of a SchemaVariable if it is a ProgramElement.
    MatchResultInfo
    Container class used to track the current rule matching status
    SVInstantiations
    Implementations of this interface know which schema variables have been matched and their respective instantiations.
